title: Emma's Sleepy Animal Friends
synopsis: Emma meets sleepy animal friends who all say goodnight with special sounds before going to bed.

pages.text: Emma is ready for bed. Time to say goodnight!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, wearing soft pink pajamas, standing in her cozy bedroom. Warm golden lamplight glows from a bedside lamp, casting a gentle light on plush toys scattered around the room.
illustration.alt: Emma in pink pajamas in her cozy, warmly lit bedroom

pages.text: The bunny says 'hop hop' and yawns. Goodnight, bunny!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, sitting on her bed next to a fluffy white bunny toy. The bunny appears to be yawning under the warm golden glow of the bedside lamp, with soft knitted blankets visible.
illustration.alt: Emma sitting with a yawning bunny toy on her bed

pages.text: The puppy says 'woof woof' and yawns. Goodnight, puppy!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, holding a brown plush puppy toy that appears to be yawning. The warm lamplight creates a cozy bedtime atmosphere with soft shadows on the walls.
illustration.alt: Emma holding a yawning puppy toy in the golden lamplight

pages.text: The kitty says 'meow meow' and yawns. Goodnight, kitty!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, cuddling with an orange striped plush cat that appears sleepy. The golden lamplight bathes the scene in warmth, with a soft knitted blanket draped nearby.
illustration.alt: Emma cuddling with a sleepy orange cat toy

pages.text: The owl says 'hoo hoo' and yawns. Goodnight, owl!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, looking at a brown owl plush toy on her nightstand. The owl appears drowsy under the soft golden glow, with the cozy bedroom bathed in warm lamplight.
illustration.alt: Emma looking at a drowsy owl toy on her nightstand

pages.text: The bear says 'grr grr' and yawns. Goodnight, bear!

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, snuggling with a large brown teddy bear that looks very sleepy. The warm golden lamplight creates soft shadows, and a plush knitted blanket surrounds them both.
illustration.alt: Emma snuggling with a large sleepy teddy bear

pages.text: Emma yawns too. 'Goodnight, friends!' Time to sleep.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, yawning as she lies in bed surrounded by all her animal friends. The golden lamplight is dimming, creating a peaceful bedtime scene with soft textures everywhere.
illustration.alt: Emma yawning in bed surrounded by all her sleepy animal friends

pages.text: Shh... shh... All the animals sleep. Emma sleeps too.

illustration.description: Emma with straight blonde hair in a ponytail, fair skin, bright blue eyes, rosy cheeks, sleeping peacefully under a soft knitted blanket with all her plush animal friends arranged around her. The lamp casts a very gentle golden glow over the quiet, cozy bedroom scene.
illustration.alt: Emma sleeping peacefully with all her animal friends in the soft lamplight

metadata.illustrationStyle: Warm golden lamplight scenes. Soft textures like knitted blankets and plush toys. Characters in pajamas with rosy cheeks. Cozy bedside glow.

questions.question: What sound does the bunny make?
What do all the animals do before sleeping?
Who sleeps with Emma at the end?
